message:
Fix heredoc delimiter collision in skill install commands

This commit addresses a potential shell parsing issue where skill content
containing the literal string "EOF" or "SKILL_EOF" could break the heredoc-
based install command generation.

Problem:
The install command uses a shell heredoc pattern like:
  cat > path/SKILL.md << 'EOF'
  ...skill content...
  EOF

If the skill content itself contains "EOF" on a line by itself, the shell
interprets it as the end of the heredoc, causing truncated output and
syntax errors.

Solution:
Introduce buildInstallCommand() helper function in both components that:
1. Starts with delimiter "JFP_SKILL"
2. Checks if the skill content contains this delimiter
3. If found, appends an incrementing suffix: JFP_SKILL_1, JFP_SKILL_2, etc.
4. Guarantees a unique delimiter that won't appear in the content

This ensures install commands work correctly regardless of skill content,
including prompts that discuss shell scripting, heredocs, or meta-
programming topics.

Affected components:
- apps/web/src/app/prompts/[id]/PromptContent.tsx (prompt detail page)
- apps/web/src/components/PromptDetailModal.tsx (modal view)

Both components now share the same robust delimiter generation logic.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
